inquiry_id: A unique identifier for each customer inquiry
date: The date when the customer inquiry was made
store_location: The location of the Lee's Market outlet where the inquiry was made
inquiry_type: The category of the customer's inquiry. In this case, 'allergen information'
handled_by: The staff member who handled the customer's inquiry
inquiry_count: The total number of inquiries of this type made on the specific date at the specific store location
